BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because custom profiles have modify all data permission.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Over-permissive profiles can affect other users/data across system boundaries.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Risk of accidental or malicious data corruption

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Data deletion or availability issues from overprivileged users

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: No known public exploits, but misconfiguration risk is real.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Over-permissive profiles can affect other users/data across system boundaries.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Overprivileged users can access all records

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Risk of accidental or malicious data corruption

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Protecting all customer/org data is essential.
